title: Plan dungeon entrance building for commons

log.context: Plan dungeon entrance building for commons

Plan posted to Discord thread 1488270313119682741 in three messages.

Here's a summary of what was found and planned:

**Architecture findings:**

The Commons overworld uses a tile-based chunk system. Chunk (0,0) is hand-coded identically in two places that must stay in sync: `commons-client/src/map/chunk.ts` (`generateChunk00`) and `commons-server/src/map.ts` (`buildChunk00`). The server copy drives NPC collision; the client copy drives what players see.
